summary: Iteration 41: Tested Maps Module Enhancements - MapBlock crash fix, hardcoded target='_blank' fix, Maps Language setting, and interactive Map Picker. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified via Playwright - all 9 features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BlockRenderer.js: MapBlock component now uses direct imports instead of React.lazy (lines 7-9) - fixes crash when rendering map blocks on dynamic pages
HomePage.js: MapSection popup links now use loc.open_in_new_tab setting (line 309) instead of hardcoded target='_blank'
SettingsManager.js: Maps Language dropdown added in General tab (lines 193-200) with MAP_LANGUAGES from mapConfig.js
MapsManager.js: Interactive Map Picker with ClickableMap component (lines 22-29, 143-151) allows click-to-set coordinates
mapConfig.js: Centralized tile URL configuration with getTileUrl() and getTileAttribution() functions, MAP_LANGUAGES export
MapTypePage.js: Uses getTileUrl(lang) from mapConfig.js for tile provider (line 62)
PortfolioManager.js: open_in_new_tab toggle visible when link is entered (lines 61-65)
FeaturedProjectsPage.js: Project links respect open_in_new_tab setting (lines 32, 46)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: (1) Admin login works with admin@consultant.com / Admin123!. (2) Settings > General tab has 'Maps Language' dropdown with 11 language options (Local, English, Spanish, etc.). (3) Maps Manager > New Location dialog shows interactive Leaflet map picker below lat/lng fields. (4) 'Our Group' page renders 2 map blocks without crashes. (5) Homepage map sections render correctly with tile provider from settings. (6) Homepage map popup links respect open_in_new_tab setting (target='_self' when false). (7) Portfolio items on homepage and /featured-projects respect open_in_new_tab. (8) /conferences and /recommended_sites pages render maps with correct tiles. (9) Portfolio Manager shows 'Open link in new tab' toggle when link is entered.

admin_login.details: Admin login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123! works correctly

maps_language_dropdown.details: Settings > General tab has Maps Language dropdown with 11 options, current value: 'local'

map_picker_in_maps_manager.details: New Location dialog shows interactive Leaflet map with 'Click the map to set coordinates' instruction

our_group_page_map_blocks.details: Our Group page (/our_group) renders 2 map blocks without crashes

homepage_map_sections.details: Homepage shows Global Business Presence and Conferences map sections with correct tiles

homepage_map_popup_links.details: Map popup links have target='_self' (respects open_in_new_tab setting, not hardcoded to _blank)

portfolio_open_in_new_tab.details: Featured Projects page shows project links with target='_self' (respects open_in_new_tab)

conferences_page.details: /conferences page renders with Leaflet map showing Tokyo Center location

recommended_sites_page.details: /recommended_sites page renders with Leaflet map showing Lima location

portfolio_manager_toggle.details: Portfolio Manager edit dialog shows 'Open link in new tab' toggle when link is entered
